name: Members Heritage
description_short: Members Plus Credit Union is a Massachusetts-based credit union offering checking, savings, loans, mortgages, and credit cards to residents and workers in five counties.
description_long:
Members Plus Credit Union is a mission-driven financial institution with deep local roots in the Massachusetts area, operating seven convenient branch locations across Essex, Middlesex, Plymouth, Suffolk, and Norfolk counties. The credit union is currently in the process of merging with Metro Credit Union, combining two strong community-focused institutions with shared commitment to people, purpose, and community service. Members Plus provides a comprehensive range of consumer financial services including no-minimum, no-fee checking and savings accounts, consumer loans, auto financing, home mortgages, home equity lines of credit, and credit card products. They emphasize personal service paired with modern digital banking conveniences like online and mobile banking platforms.

The credit union offers competitive rates across its product portfolio, including consumer loans starting at 9.99% APR, new auto loans as low as 4.95% APR, home equity lines of credit at 6.75% APR, and their High-Five Money Market Account at 3.50% APY. They also provide specialized products like the Mass Save HEAT Loan program offering 0% APR financing for energy efficiency improvements, and the MPCU Rewards Credit Card with a 4.90% introductory APR rate. Members Plus distinguishes itself by offering no-fee access to thousands of ATMs through the CO-OP network, shared branch access, and a Friends + Family Rewards program, plus expanded membership eligibility that now includes anyone living or working in five surrounding counties.

Members Plus positions itself as offering the benefits of larger institutions—online and mobile banking, extensive ATM networks—with the personalized service of a community-focused credit union. Their website emphasizes security and fraud prevention, explicitly reassuring members that the institution will never call, email, or text requesting login credentials or PINs. The upcoming merger with Metro Credit Union suggests a growth phase that may expand service offerings and branch accessibility further.

As a credit union, Members Plus is best suited for individuals seeking traditional banking services with competitive rates and community accountability rather than cutting-edge fintech features. The main caveat is that membership is restricted to those living or working in specific Massachusetts counties, limiting geographic accessibility. Additionally, while they offer competitive rates, prospective borrowers should compare their offerings against both other credit unions and banks to ensure optimal terms for their specific needs.
services: New auto loans as low as 4.95% APR
Home equity lines of credit at 6.75% APR
Mass Save HEAT Loan program (0% APR energy efficiency financing)
MPCU Rewards Credit Card with cash back rewards
High-Five Money Market Account at 3.50% APY
CO-OP ATM network access and shared branch locator service
pros: No-minimum, no-fee checking and savings accounts with competitive rates
New auto loans as low as 4.95% APR for up to 4-year terms
Mass Save HEAT Loan program offering 0% APR financing for energy efficiency
No-fee access to thousands of ATMs nationwide through CO-OP network plus shared branch locations
Seven convenient physical branch locations across five counties
MPCU Rewards Credit Card with 4.90% introductory APR and cash rewards
Expanded membership eligibility to anyone living or working in Essex, Middlesex, Plymouth, Suffolk, or Norfolk counties
cons: Membership geographically restricted to five Massachusetts counties only
Limited branch footprint (7 locations) compared to major banks
Merger with Metro Credit Union may create service disruptions or changes during transition period
best_for: Massachusetts residents and workers in Essex, Middlesex, Plymouth, Suffolk, or Norfolk counties seeking community-focused banking
Auto buyers looking for competitive new car loan rates with manageable terms
Homeowners interested in energy efficiency improvements through the Mass Save HEAT Loan 0% APR program
Consumers prioritizing personal service and security with modern digital banking convenience
diagnosis: Members Plus Credit Union is best for Massachusetts residents and workers in its five-county service area who value personalized service, competitive rates, and community accountability in their financial institution. The main caveat is strict geographic eligibility requirements that exclude those outside the specified counties, and prospective members should verify they meet membership qualifications before applying.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
